title: Simuleytarka Shaqaalaysiinta
askAiPrompt: Waxaan tixgelinayaa inaan shaqaalaysiiyo {headcount} qof oo qiimahoodu yahay {monthlyCost}/bishii ({annualCost}/sannadkii). Faa'iidada saafiga ah ee hadda: {netProfit}, muddada: {runway} bilood. Shaqaalaysiinta ka dib: faa'iidada saafiga ah waxay hoos ugu dhacaysaa {newNetProfit}, muddaduna {newRunway} bilood. Waxaan u baahanahay {revenueNeeded}/bishii dakhli dheeraad ah si aan u ilaaliyo faa'iidada. Haddaan hadda shaqaalaysiiyo mise aan sugo?
subtitle: U qaabee saameynta maaliyadeed ee shaqaale cusub ee P&L-kaaga iyo muddada lacagta ka hor intaadan go'aansan.
burdenNote: Waxaa ku jira canshuur, faa'iidooyin, qalab
insightRevenueNeeded: Dakhliga loo baahan yahay si loo kala baxo shaqaalaysiinta
insightRevenuePerHire: Dakhliga shaqaale kasta si loo daboolo kharashka
warningLoss: Shaqaalaysiintu waxay ku gelinaysaa khasaare — hubi in koritaanka dakhligu daboolo kharashka
runwayAlertValue: Kaliya {n} bilood shaqaalaysiinta ka dib — tixgeli waqtiga ama shaqaalaysiin tallaabo-tallaabo ah
healthyRunwayValue: {n} bilood — kaydka raaxada leh ee shaqaale cusub
